item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Jika hanya fokus pada kepentingan sosial tanpa melibatkan partisipasi aktif warga, risiko penindasan bisa terjadi.

notes: Agent A begins by agreeing that society should take priority, but by turns 3 and 5 shifts toward Agent B's autonomy, participation, minority-rights, and anti-domination framing. Agent B stays consistently balance/rights-oriented and ends with a stronger minority-protection and accountability critique.
